phase_name: Fix: tomli missing from venv — LLM step fails with ModuleNotFoundError
goal: llm.py tries `import tomllib` (Python 3.11+ stdlib) and falls back to `import tomli as tomllib` (third-party). The venv runs Python 3.9.6 (Xcode), so tomllib is absent from the stdlib. tomli was never added to the pip install in run_setup_commands(), so neither import succeeds and the LLM step fails immediately. Fix: (1) add tomli to the pip install so new venvs include it; (2) replace venv_numpy_ok() with venv_healthy() that checks both numpy<2 AND tomli in a single subprocess; (3) replace the blunt teardown gate with a two-stage repair: try pip install in-place first, full teardown only on pip failure; (4) add a Makefile install target so the fixed binary can be deployed to /Applications/ without manual copying.
root_cause: run_setup_commands() installs 'numpy<2 openai-whisper ollama' but not 'tomli'. llm.py's module-level import of tomli fails at process start, before any LLM call is made, producing ModuleNotFoundError propagated to the user as 'LLM generation failed'.

tasks.title: Add `"tomli"` to pip install args in `run_setup_commands()` (`src/app.rs`)
tasks.description:
One-arg change: append `"tomli"` to the pip install args so every new venv includes it.

Current (line ~217):
```rust
.args(["install", "--quiet", "numpy<2", "openai-whisper", "ollama"])
```

Replace with:
```rust
.args(["install", "--quiet", "numpy<2", "openai-whisper", "ollama", "tomli"])
```
checks: Run `cargo build` exit 0; `cargo clippy -- -D warnings` clean.
Remove `~/.config/yaptap/.venv/`; trigger first-launch setup; confirm `pip show tomli` in the new venv shows a version.

tasks.title: Replace `fn venv_numpy_ok()` with `fn venv_healthy()` in `src/app.rs`
checks: Run `cargo build` exit 0; `cargo clippy -- -D warnings` clean.
Confirm `venv_numpy_ok` no longer appears anywhere in src/app.rs (`grep venv_numpy_ok src/app.rs` → no output).
With tomli absent and numpy 1.x: `venv_healthy()` returns false.
With tomli installed and numpy 1.x: `venv_healthy()` returns true.
With no venv: `venv_healthy()` returns true.

tasks.title: Add `fn try_pip_repair() -> bool` to `src/app.rs`
checks: Run `cargo build` exit 0; `cargo clippy -- -D warnings` clean.
With a healthy venv: `try_pip_repair()` exits 0 and returns true.
With a broken pip path (no venv): `try_pip_repair()` returns false.

tasks.title: Replace repair gate in `run_app()` with two-stage repair using `venv_healthy()` and `try_pip_repair()` (`src/app.rs`)
checks: Run `cargo build` exit 0; `cargo clippy -- -D warnings` clean.
With tomli absent from venv (pip repair succeeds): launch app — no setup alert, no teardown, app starts directly; `pip show tomli` in venv shows a version.
With numpy>=2 in venv (pip repair likely fails due to pip refusing to downgrade): launch app — venv is deleted, 'Setting up YapTap' alert appears, new venv has numpy 1.x and tomli.
With healthy venv (numpy 1.x, tomli present): launch app — no setup alert, tray icon appears directly.

tasks.title: Add `install` target to `Makefile`
tasks.description:
Add a `make install` target that copies the built app bundle to /Applications/. This is needed to deploy the fix to the running copy without manually dragging files.

Add `install` to the `.PHONY` line and add the target after `app`:

```makefile
.PHONY: build icns app install dmg clean
```

```makefile
## Install app bundle to /Applications/ (replaces existing copy)
install: app
	rm -rf /Applications/YapTap.app
	cp -r $(APP_DIR) /Applications/YapTap.app
	@echo "Installed: /Applications/YapTap.app"
```

Place immediately after the `app` target block and before the `dmg` target.
checks: Run `make install` — exits 0, prints 'Installed: /Applications/YapTap.app'.
`ls -la /Applications/YapTap.app` shows the freshly built bundle with today's timestamp.

tasks.title: Verify `cargo build`, `cargo clippy -- -D warnings`, and `cargo test` pass clean
tasks.description: After P11-T001 through P11-T005, confirm no regressions.
checks: Run `cargo build` — exit 0.
Run `cargo clippy -- -D warnings` — no warnings.
Run `cargo test` — all tests pass.

tasks.title: End-to-end: `make install`, verify pip repair path and LLM step
tasks.description:
Verify the full repair-and-deploy pipeline.

1. Confirm tomli is missing from the current venv: `~/.config/yaptap/.venv/bin/pip show tomli` → 'WARNING: Package(s) not found'.
2. Run `make install` — builds release binary, assembles bundle, copies to /Applications/.
3. Launch /Applications/YapTap.app — pip repair should run silently (no setup alert), app starts.
4. Confirm tomli is now present: `~/.config/yaptap/.venv/bin/pip show tomli` → shows version.
5. Press hotkey, speak, select a prompt — LLM step completes, result on clipboard. No 'ModuleNotFoundError: No module named tomli' alert.
checks: `make install` exits 0.
App launches without 'Setting up YapTap' alert.
`pip show tomli` in venv shows a version after launch.
LLM step no longer triggers 'ModuleNotFoundError: No module named tomli'.
Transcription still works (no regression).
